description_long: This umbrella features a metallic, gold-colored canopy with a segmented design, giving it a futuristic and robust appearance. The canopy is composed of several distinct panels, each with visible seams and some areas showing wear or patina, suggesting frequent use or exposure to the elements. At the center of the canopy is a circular hub, possibly housing the opening mechanism, with a subtle blue accent ring. The shaft is straight and metallic, matching the gold tone of the canopy, and appears sturdy and industrial. The handle is straight and simple, lacking any ergonomic or decorative features. The overall design is sleek and modern, making it suitable for urban environments where durability and style are important.
description: A gold, segmented metallic umbrella with a straight handle and a central hub, featuring a sleek, modern design and visible wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full gold canopy with visible segment seams and central hub, straight shaft below.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the right side's canopy curvature and wear patterns.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar canopy segmentation, highlighting the blue accent ring at the hub.
description_view_3: Rear view with consistent canopy segmentation and shaft, showing subtle reflections and wear.
